user.title: Danelfin Configuration
user.description: Enter your API key and set the update interval. You can also enable global tracking for Top 5 recommendations.

add_ticker.title: Add Ticker to Monitor
add_ticker.description: Provide the stock or ETF symbol. Ensure the format matches the selected market. Examples: NVDA (US), SAN.MC (Europe), SPY (ETF).

data_description.market: Select 'Europe' only for stocks using RIC format (e.g. .DE, .PA)

abort.already_configured: This ticker is already being tracked.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please verify it on danelfin.com
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Danelfin API. Check your internet or API key.
error.ticker_invalid: Invalid format. Use symbols like NVDA, SAN.MC or BUG (max 12 chars).

init.title: Danelfin Options
init.description: Adjust tracking preferences and update frequency. Note: Frequent updates may consume your API quota faster.

abort.no_options: No configurable options for this entry.
